figmaApiFileId.description: The file ID for the Figma file to pull icons from

changelogFile.description: The CHANGELOG.md file to output changelog updates to.

manifestFile.description: The manifest.json file to track illustration syncs.

lightModeManifestFile.description: The manifest.json file for light color styles

darkModeManifestFile.description: The manifest.json file for dark color styles

generatedDirectory.description: The directory to output generated files.

syncAll.description: Sync all illustrations regardless of when they were last updated

exitOnBreakingChanges.description: Exit with an error when breaking changes are detected
